task: I need to text my supervisor that I can cover part of a shift but not the whole thing. Can you draft it in a way that’s clear and ready to send, without making it sound too stiff?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a clear, natural text you can send:

**“Hey [Supervisor’s Name], I can cover part of the shift, but I won’t be able to stay for the whole thing. Just wanted to give you a heads-up so you can plan accordingly.”**

If you want, I can also make it sound:
- more casual
- more professional
- shorter/textier

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I’d text that.
